sentence: Not only did she finish the project, but she also exceeded expectations
explanation: 'Not only' triggers inversion: 'did she finish' (not 'she did finish').

sentence: Hardly had he arrived when the meeting started
explanation: 'Hardly' triggers inversion: 'had he arrived'. Followed by 'when'.

sentence: Never have I seen such a beautiful sunset
explanation: 'Never' at the start triggers inversion: 'have I seen'.

sentence: Seldom does he take a day off from work
explanation: 'Seldom' triggers inversion: 'does he take'.

sentence: No sooner had they left than it started to rain
hint: No sooner + had + subject + pp + than
explanation: 'No sooner' triggers inversion: 'had they left'. Followed by 'than'.

sentence: Only after reading the report did she understand the problem
explanation: 'Only after' triggers inversion in the main clause: 'did she understand'.

sentence: Under no circumstances should you share this information
explanation: 'Under no circumstances' triggers inversion: 'should you share'.

sentence: Rarely do we get the chance to work with such talented people
explanation: 'Rarely' triggers inversion: 'do we get'.

sentence: Not until the results were published did the public react
hint: Not until + clause + inversion in main clause
explanation: 'Not until' triggers inversion in the main clause: 'did the public react'.

sentence: Little did they know that the company was about to close
explanation: 'Little' triggers inversion: 'did they know'.

sentence: Only when she apologized did he agree to continue the discussion
explanation: 'Only when' triggers inversion in the main clause: 'did he agree'.

sentence: At no point during the trial was the defendant allowed to speak
explanation: 'At no point' triggers inversion: 'was the defendant allowed'.

sentence: So impressed was the jury that they gave her the highest score
explanation: 'So + adjective' triggers inversion: 'So impressed was the jury'.

sentence: In no way does this decision reflect our personal opinions
explanation: 'In no way' triggers inversion: 'does this decision reflect'.

sentence: Only by working together can we solve this complex problem
explanation: 'Only by' triggers inversion: 'can we solve'.

sentence: Not once did he complain about the difficult conditions
explanation: 'Not once' triggers inversion: 'did he complain'.

sentence: Scarcely had the concert begun when the power went out
explanation: 'Scarcely' triggers inversion: 'had the concert begun'. Followed by 'when'.

sentence: On no account must this document be shared with outsiders
explanation: 'On no account' triggers inversion: 'must this document be shared'.

sentence: Only if you complete the training will you receive the certificate
explanation: 'Only if' triggers inversion in the main clause: 'will you receive'.

sentence: Nowhere in the city will you find a better restaurant than this
explanation: 'Nowhere' triggers inversion: 'will you find'.
